channel.title: MacPipeGUI Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.0

  • Fixed password saving/loading on Linux and macOS — safeStorage encryption failures now fall back to plain base64 instead of silently discarding the password
  • Fixed cross-session decryption mismatch that caused passwords stored in one session to become unreadable in the next
  • Fixed Settings page silently wiping a stored password when the decryption error left the field blank
  • Added clear warning when a saved password cannot be decrypted, prompting re-entry
  • Fixed profile search — the search box now actually filters the profile list
  • Build Runner now pre-selects the profile chosen on the Profiles tab
  • Build logs and running state no longer reset when switching tabs mid-build
